title: Mooru Kaasina Kudure
description: Ganga is a city cab driver & Dhanu is an aspiring actor who wants to make a big name in film industry Both of these characters need money at any cost to pursue their dream life. Situation takes a new turn when Dhanu hops on Ganga's cab in search of money, and it becomes even more interesting when Baby catches same cab. The story narrates how these three prime characters face the challenges.
